sections.heading: Pathway

flowchart.title: Incidental Finding of Gallbladder Cancer During Surgery

nodes.label: Incidental suspicious mass during surgery, hepatobiliary expertise available
Incidental suspicious mass, expertise unavailable OR resectability unclear
Document findings, refer to hepatobiliary surgeon

edges.label: Document findings, refer to hepatobiliary surgeon

sections.heading: Pathway

flowchart.title: Incidental Finding of Gallbladder Cancer on Pathologic Review

nodes.label: T1b or greater, OR T1a with positive margins, OR cystic duct node positive
Hepatic resection + lymphadenectomy ± bile duct excision

edges.label: Hepatic resection + lymphadenectomy ± bile duct excision

sections.heading: Pathway

flowchart.title: Gallbladder Cancer Presenting as Mass on Imaging

nodes.label: Cholecystectomy + en bloc hepatic resection + lymphadenectomy ± bile duct excision
Systemic therapy (preferred) OR clinical trial (preferred) OR palliative radiation therapy

edges.label: Cholecystectomy + en bloc hepatic resection + lymphadenectomy ± bile duct excision
Systemic therapy (preferred) OR clinical trial (preferred) OR palliative radiation therapy

sections.heading: Pathway

flowchart.title: Gallbladder Cancer with Jaundice and/or Metastatic Disease

nodes.label: Cholecystectomy + en bloc hepatic resection + lymphadenectomy + bile duct excision
Systemic therapy (preferred) OR clinical trial (preferred) OR best supportive care

edges.label: Cholecystectomy + en bloc hepatic resection + lymphadenectomy + bile duct excision
Systemic therapy (preferred) OR clinical trial (preferred) OR best supportive care
